name: Playful Productivity
summary: Friendly modular SaaS system with colorful structure, rounded blocks, approachable labels, and onboarding clarity.

style_dna.philosophy: Make complex workflows feel learnable through modular color, friendly containers, and clear labels.
style_dna.visual_signature: Rounded cards, colorful chips, structured boards, and approachable product rhythm.
style_dna.surface_logic: White canvas, pale modular blocks, color used for grouping.

palette.accent_policy: Use color for organization and affordance, not random decoration.
palette.semantic_policy: Semantic states may be colorful but must stay labeled.

layout.grid: Board, card, and checklist patterns with obvious groupings.
layout.whitespace: Friendly and scannable; keep modules distinct.
layout.image_treatment: Product UI snapshots, icons, simple diagrams, and light illustrations.

components.buttons: Rounded primary, outlined secondary, compact icon chips.
components.cards: Task cards, checklist modules, tabs, and color-coded groups.
components.tables: Turn tables into cards when social/deck output benefits.

slides.accent_rule: Use color blocks for organization, not random decoration.

document.heading_rule: Use steps, checklists, and modular callouts.

source_inheritance.method: Synthesized from local getdesign.md working corpus.

dont: Do not scatter colors without grouping logic.
Do not use luxury black-canvas drama.

pptx: Use deterministic HTML/CSS or PPTX text boxes for final text.
Keep one core idea per slide and validate rendered PNG dimensions.
docx: Translate visual style into Word typography, margins, heading hierarchy, tables, and callouts.
Keep documents printable unless the user explicitly requests PDF-only visual art direction.
carousel: Use high-resolution fixed canvas, mobile-readable text, and safe margins.
Make each frame complete enough to stand alone.
